name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578b50cfc7eb91c495592ce4e309a1b1e84aac4001b7c1da9adb634c75367f601fbfdd90957168c9d4fa43cd57cdb3b1cac2

Trump Meets Kim and Sets the Stage for Fundamental Change in Asia -– Here's What His Critics Missed

- Fox News

“President Trump got to this point by ignoring all the establishment experts,” writes Christian Whiton, Senior Fellow at the Center for the National Interest. Unlike previous administrations, “President Trump and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo have insisted that North Korea undertake actual disarmament before real financial concessions or even sanctions relief.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578bf22b5a91191ff3b2ab5f45804473fe22e65a57cb19e8956b0f8f271a288227425be9e99e49786000c050432f734a9085

Newt Gingrich: Trump Has Accomplished More Than Clinton, Bush, and Obama Combined - This Is Just the Beginning

- Fox News

“With his historic summit Tuesday with North Korean leader Kim Jong Un, President Trump has once again done something astounding and unpredictable,” former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich writes. “Through a combination of toughness and boldness, aggressiveness and flexibility, and resolution and an amazingly fast grasping of tactical opportunities — President Trump may have begun the process of opening up North Korea and changing history,” he adds.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578b270ff009f8a83aa3f44a771e67b23d78ba71a405b2572795720b51d065a456f6ca8b5b227e1ba219b1caf6c3cf7f2a4b

World Leaders Come Out in Support of Historic Trump-Kim Summit

- New York Post

“The deal between President Trump and North Korean leader Kim Jong Un was met by world leaders with optimism and praise for the prospect of denuclearization,” Yaron Steinbuch reports. “At a train station in Seoul, people cheered and applauded as TV screens broadcast the Trump-Kim handshake live.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578bdf4fbab502bd3a0bceb383aeda59a1247e9f10621acb5ef22795486f89a705e05be2b22fa7377b8d23154c53179f283c

Trump Summit Ends Decades of Failed ‘Patience’ on North Korea

- Washington Examiner

“Not since Ronald Reagan have we had a president who has so ably combined fiscal and economic policy with defense policy to restore our position as the greatest and most potent economic and military power in the world — providing the credibility and leverage to make clear to our adversaries, and to our allies, that we can, and must, be taken seriously as a force for good,” former Rep. Nan Hayworth writes.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578b9c59e1db821abc2ace971e381a5557f9136f646925b2a52fc90906f8680cd5538947787298e9302ba26b6e4e9303fb15

U.S. Retail Sales Post Biggest Gain in Six Months

- Reuters

Reuters reports that “U.S. retail sales increased more than expected in May as consumers bought motor vehicle[s] and a range of other goods,” according to the Commerce Department. The strong retail report accompanies recent good news about the jobs market, suggesting the U.S. economy is regaining momentum this quarter.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578bfd53f5a5be77c2c1d369b295e4e2769d10dec930507f1acb55abca9943d5009665eccc46dcbf14bc7699a7b18256d54e

Closing the Knowledge Gap on Opioids

- The Washington Times

“Every American needs to know the truth about opioids so we can spread the truth and turn the tide on this crisis,” writes Jim Carroll, Deputy Director of the Office of National Drug Control Policy. “That’s why the Trump administration just launched ‘The Truth About Opioids’ — a public education campaign focused on preventing and reducing the misuse of opioids, closing the knowledge gap about the risks of misusing opioids, and knowing what to do when someone becomes addicted.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578b3e3290b9dc7a0b765fbaec5a123d8bf01305f393a65984f6243eefa4c830d0e52eb336734979c8559b9e12cfff4b13d4
Why President Trump Will Be the Greatest Civil Rights President in a Generation: Darrell Scott

- Cleveland Plain Dealer

“If you combine the FIRST STEP Act with President Trump's vocal leadership on the national stage, his success lowering minority unemployment to record-setting lows, and his executive actions to right historical wrongs, no president in recent memory has been this ambitious to help communities impacted by mass incarceration,” Pastor Darrell Scott writes.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578b2d33a39968c80926dd8cf13afebe05b89e197782a60058ce06422c8da43ab9553cbea56f7b4cfd431b469e7cf0a7adf5
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e45694b3a0c4578b1d4bbaa9fa0183743dcd5b8d0b61d5c8b3a6b780961ae87c42d950434a2be70328742a7dbbf61c2ef27809f6cb405d3a
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43bba4b30465265fc307102da80bf52e42c0a7265a7ba951d807ea63005ae945ce44802f611ba1c578ef9d0f913bb6edafbf28ed11fe24776
Unsubscribe

name: Ted Lieu
subject: I need you to step up, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Let me be very clear about something that Republicans would like us to forget: Congress has the power to prevent more mass shootings from happening by passing reasonable gun safety legislation.
---
Last November, I walked out of the House chamber during a moment of silence after the mass shooting in Sutherland Springs, Texas. Today I'd like to take a minute to tell you why.

Since I was elected to Congress in 2014, I've attended far too many moments of silence. After each one, nothing else happens. No legislation, no debate.

Let me be very clear about something that Republicans would like us to forget: Congress has the power to prevent more mass shootings from happening by passing reasonable gun safety legislation. If Republicans in Congress who are in the pocket of the gun lobby won't do anything to stop these senseless tragedies, it's time to elect Democrats who will.

**The gun lobby is prepared to spend tens of millions of dollars to defeat Democrats. Contribute $3 today to give our candidates the resources to organize and win.**

[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cca/4067b0a/6404bfbfe/7fbab897/2098703307/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180616_tl_nd&source=em_20180616_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180616_tl_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cca/4067b0a/6404bfbfe/7fbab894/2098703307/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180616_tl_nd&source=em_20180616_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180616_tl_nd")
** Every time a mass shooting happens we tweet out our thoughts and prayers, have a moment of silence, and then go back to business as usual. But I am done being silent, Derek, and the American people are too.

After the horrific shooting in Parkland, students across the country raised their voices to demand an end to senseless gun violence. Together we are showing that the days are numbered when Republicans can offer nothing but thoughts and prayers when tragedy strikes.

This year's election is our chance to vote them out -- and electing Democrats across the country has never been as important as it is right now.

**[Chip in $3 for the first time this year to make sure Democrats have the resources to organize and defeat the gun lobby in all 50 states.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522cca/4067b0a/6404bfbfe/7fbab895/2098703307/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tl-june?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+3++if+consinConsGroup29422again+&utm_campaign=em_20180616_tl_nd&source=em_20180616_tl_nd&refcode=em_20180616_tl_nd")**

Thanks for your support,

Ted

Ted Lieu
U.S. Representative, CA-33

clean_body: Let me be very clear about something that Republicans would like us to forget: Congress has the power to prevent more mass shootings from happening by passing reasonable gun safety legislation. Last November, I walked out of the House chamber during a moment of silence after the mass shooting in Sutherland Springs, Texas. Today I'd like to take a minute to tell you why. Since I was elected to Congress in 2014, I've attended far too many moments of silence. After each one, nothing else happens. No legislation, no debate. Let me be very clear about something that Republicans would like us to forget: Congress has the power to prevent more mass shootings from happening by passing reasonable gun safety legislation. If Republicans in Congress who are in the pocket of the gun lobby won't do anything to stop these senseless tragedies, it's time to elect Democrats who will. The gun lobby is prepared to spend tens of millions of dollars to defeat Democrats. Contribute $3 today to give our candidates the resources to organize and win. "" "" "" "" "" "" Every time a mass shooting happens we tweet out our thoughts and prayers, have a moment of silence, and then go back to business as usual. But I am done being silent, Derek, and the American people are too. After the horrific shooting in Parkland, students across the country raised their voices to demand an end to senseless gun violence. Together we are showing that the days are numbered when Republicans can offer nothing but thoughts and prayers when tragedy strikes. This year's election is our chance to vote them out -- and electing Democrats across the country has never been as important as it is right now. "" Thanks for your support, Ted Ted Lieu U.S. Representative, CA-33 P.S. We can't end our country's epidemic of gun violence unless we elect Democrats who are prepared to stand up to the gun lobby. ""

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Stand with Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0b1/2a380d31/e5362a7/f19325/274450628/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0b1/2a380d31/e5362a7/f19325/274450628/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
Donald Trump has made it his mission to attack a woman's right to make decisions about her own health care.
His latest attack--imposing the 'Gag Rule' and gutting Title X -- is one of the worst to date. It's a thinly veiled attempt to defund Planned Parenthood and the critical health care it provides.
This could result in millions of people losing access to preventative care and family planning services, so we have to fight back.
Here's the link to our petition urging Trump and the GOP to stop attacking a woman's right to make her own health care decisions. Could you please sign?
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/Protect-Reproductive-Rights**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0b1/2a380d31/e5362a7/f19326/274450628/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_reproductive-rights%3Frefcode%3D20180611_TitleXJA_up%26recurring%3Dauto")
Trump's restrictions will make it MUCH more difficult for organizations like Planned Parenthood, health care providers, and medical clinics to give essential information to women as they make important decisions about their health.
Even worse? They'll disproportionately affect poor and uninsured women who are most at-risk.
[**If you 're ready to do something about these attacks on reproductive health care, please click here to sign our petition.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0b1/2a380d31/e5362a7/f19326/274450628/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_reproductive-rights%3Frefcode%3D20180611_TitleXJA_up%26recurring%3Dauto")
Thank you for speaking out against the Trump administration's anti-woman agenda.
-- Team Maggie

name: Kelly Langford, Team Kaine Email Director
subject: Father's Day is our super bowl.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I know you've been getting a lot of emails from us this month (there's so much going on in June) but amidst the primary battles and fundraising deadlines we want to celebrate America's dad, Tim Kaine.
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, here at Tim Kaine HQ, we consider Father's Day kind of like our super bowl.

I know you've been getting a lot of emails from us this month (there's so much going on in June) but amidst the primary battles and fundraising deadlines we want to celebrate America's dad, Tim Kaine.

[Signing the card only takes a minute, promise! And there's a fun video waiting for you.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e341184/583437447/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Signing+the+card+only+takes+a+minute+pro&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS")

No matter what Father's Day means to you, I hope you know that Tim Kaine will always be proud of you for turning your grade around in math or conquering your fear of public speaking.

[And if you're like me, you think a card is always nice with a little bit of money folded inside (especially since you know Tim will spend it all in a good place - getting re-elected!)](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e34119b/583437447/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+And+if+yoursquore+like+me+you+think+a+ca&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS")

Thanks!

_Kelly Langford_
Email Director
Kaine for Virginia \----------------------ORIGINAL MESSAGE---------------------- FROM: [New Video] from [TimKaine.com](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e34119a/583437447/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+TimKainecom&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS")
SUBJECT: Tim Kaine won't be mad, he'll be disappointed (if you don't sign and watch our video!) Derek - a lot of people got to know Tim a little better in 2016. And a common theme started to emerge... [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e341199/583437447/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS") [Click to watch our NEW video - a tribute to Tim Kaine and his dad jokes >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e341198/583437447/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Click+to+watch+our+NEW+video++a+tribute+&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS")

Well, now Tim is aware of his role and embraces it, and here on Team Kaine, we see him live up to it every day.

Whether it's reminding everyone to stay hydrated and wear sunscreen at parades or getting riled up when talking about how you need to _really listen_ to old music on vinyl - he always fits the mold pretty well. [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e34119f/583437447/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS") The fact is, Tim Kaine has always been telling dad jokes, to him they were just regular jokes he found especially funny.

So don't worry, if you see a funny comment about Tim Kaine being a "total dad," we can confirm for you: It's true. His wife, Anne, says 90% of the jokes about things Tim Kaine would say or do are 100% accurate. [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e34119e/583437447/VEsB/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS") [You haven't signed the card yet! It's not too late - Father's Day is tomorrow, so if you sign it now you'll make it just in time! Plus, we have a new video up! Click through to watch it!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e34119d/583437447/VEsO/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+You+havenrsquot+signed+the+card+yet+Itrs&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS")

**(And don 't worry, Tim Kaine won't give you a lecture about procrastinating...)** | [**SIGN TIM 'S CARD**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1398/3e0906/6a6271c4/3e34119c/583437447/VEsP/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Americas-Dad?source=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+SIGN+TIMrsquoS+CARD&utm_campaign=20180616_1_CARD_KL_Dad-Joke-FWD-NS")

Thanks!

_Dad Joke HQ (Team Kaine)_

name: Tracy Newman
subject: FWD: Saving our health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Did you see Gov. Inslee's message to you?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79342/2f5ea88d/70beefc1/2cbced3c/365316252/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") Hi Friend -- Did you see Gov. Inslee's note on Friday? The recent attacks on our health care are not a joke. All of our friends and family members with a pre-existing condition -- whether it be asthma, cancer, or a heart condition they were born with -- may soon be denied health insurance. And rates for EVERYONE are going up (by 19% or more), thanks to the Republicans' efforts to sink Obamacare. This is why we need leaders like Jay to make waves across the nation. He's been an avid defender of affordable health care and has made great progress in Washington state. Our progressive leadership here is showing the country what's possible. We're not just going to talk the talk about it -- we're proving the power of our progressive agenda in action. But this time, we need to look Trump in the eye and speak truth to power. Trump, his cronies in Congress, and his Department of Justice are putting our most vulnerable at risk. [**So I'm asking you to stand up now and prove the power of our movement -- and that we're ready to defend affordable health care for all. Chip in now before our mid-month deadline at midnight -- we need everyone on board.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79342/2f5ea88d/70beefc1/2cbced3c/365316252/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema") | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79342/2f5ea88d/70beefc1/2cbced3c/365316252/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")
---
Thanks,
Tracy

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Friday, June 15, 2018
Subject: The Trump administration is crushing our health care
Friend,
For months, health care experts have warned us. The Trump administration's health care policies only mean one thing:
**Higher insurance rates for all of us -- here in Washington and nationwide.**
We knew that the very "reforms" pushed by Trump and Republicans in Congress -- repealing the individual mandate, refusing to pay cost-sharing subsidies, allowing for short-term minimalist plans, and now attacking access for those with pre-existing conditions -- would result in far fewer Americans with health care coverage. But now it's clear that the Republicans are hurting even those people with coverage, by sending health care premiums through the roof.
[**We fought hard with President Obama for the _Affordable Care Act_. But Republicans are crushing our chances at fair, affordable care for all Americans. I need you to step up now and show that you're ready to defend our nation's health care. Chip in to show you're on my team.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79342/2f5ea88d/70beefc1/2cbced3c/365316252/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")
Here's what we're seeing: Eleven health insurers, in 74 health plans proposed for Washington's 2019 health insurance market, are planning to increase rates by an average of 19%.
19% across the board. That's a lot more money to spend on health care, and it will definitely make it harder for Washington families to pay the bills and access care.
[THAT'S NOT RIGHT »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79342/2f5ea88d/70beefc1/2cbced3c/365316252/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")
---
So what's to blame for this rate hike? The Trump administration's plans have sent insurance markets into chaos, and when insurers get scared, they pass the cost onto all of us.
Just this month, when Jeff Sessions announced that the Justice Department would not defend the _Affordable Care Act_ in court, he threw into question the future for millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions. And not only did he put our most vulnerable at risk -- he caused waves in the insurance markets as well.
Look, here in Washington, we will continue to do everything we can to provide affordable options for consumers. But ultimately Congress has to do its part to protect our care.
Americans need stability and affordability in health insurance, not the chaos caused by the Trump administration. That's why we need bold leadership that will defend health care as a right, not a privilege.
[**Before our mid-month deadline on Saturday, make your voice heard: Chip in $5 or more to show that you stand with the progressive movement to defend affordable health care for all.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79342/2f5ea88d/70beefc1/2cbced3c/365316252/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-month-june-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&refcode=ema_2018-06-16_mid-month-2&utm_campaign=mid-month-2&utm_medium=ema")

Jay Inslee

clean_body: Did you see Gov. Inslee's message to you? | "" Hi Friend -- Did you see Gov. Inslee's note on Friday? The recent attacks on our health care are not a joke. All of our friends and family members with a pre-existing condition -- whether it be asthma, cancer, or a heart condition they were born with -- may soon be denied health insurance. And rates for EVERYONE are going up (by 19% or more), thanks to the Republicans' efforts to sink Obamacare. This is why we need leaders like Jay to make waves across the nation. He's been an avid defender of affordable health care and has made great progress in Washington state. Our progressive leadership here is showing the country what's possible. We're not just going to talk the talk about it -- we're proving the power of our progressive agenda in action. But this time, we need to look Trump in the eye and speak truth to power. Trump, his cronies in Congress, and his Department of Justice are putting our most vulnerable at risk. "" | "" Thanks, Tracy \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Jay Inslee Date: Friday, June 15, 2018 Subject: The Trump administration is crushing our health care Friend, For months, health care experts have warned us. The Trump administration's health care policies only mean one thing: Higher insurance rates for all of us -- here in Washington and nationwide. We knew that the very "reforms" pushed by Trump and Republicans in Congress -- repealing the individual mandate, refusing to pay cost-sharing subsidies, allowing for short-term minimalist plans, and now attacking access for those with pre-existing conditions -- would result in far fewer Americans with health care coverage. But now it's clear that the Republicans are hurting even those people with coverage, by sending health care premiums through the roof. "" Here's what we're seeing: Eleven health insurers, in 74 health plans proposed for Washington's 2019 health insurance market, are planning to increase rates by an average of 19%. 19% across the board. That's a lot more money to spend on health care, and it will definitely make it harder for Washington families to pay the bills and access care. "" So what's to blame for this rate hike? The Trump administration's plans have sent insurance markets into chaos, and when insurers get scared, they pass the cost onto all of us. Just this month, when Jeff Sessions announced that the Justice Department would not defend the Affordable Care Act in court, he threw into question the future for millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions. And not only did he put our most vulnerable at risk -- he caused waves in the insurance markets as well. Look, here in Washington, we will continue to do everything we can to provide affordable options for consumers. But ultimately Congress has to do its part to protect our care. Americans need stability and affordability in health insurance, not the chaos caused by the Trump administration. That's why we need bold leadership that will defend health care as a right, not a privilege. "" Very truly yours, Jay Inslee ""

body:
| | | |

| | | [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=cea9e369f8&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| **FIGHTERS NEEDED **
**Peter,** This is war. Look around you. We who cherish Liberty are being surrounded by a raging mob of radical leftists who will stop at nothing to BURN DOWN our 2nd Amendment. They have resorted to using children as shields and weapons to fight their war on our liberties. The gun-grabbing left aim to strip us completely of our unalienable right to keep and bear arms. And now we know; they will stop at nothing. **The Gun-Grabbing Left is EXTRAORDINARILY WELL FUNDED** **Why? Because a handful of billionaires FUND the anti-gun agenda**
Their aim? Convince our next generation to blame our 2nd Amendment as the _sole cause_ of gun violence in this country. Think they can't do it?

**Consider this:**
Gun-Grabbing Billionaires control mass media. It is through mass media that they will demonize and DESTROY our right to bear arms under the 2nd Amendment.

**WHO ARE THESE RADICAL LEFTISTS and their RADICAL BILLIONAIRES? **[Forbes lays it out.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=03221e2e7b&e=9da9b0ca31)

_These billionaires are pumping money into a 100% Anti-Gun and Dismantle-the-Constitution Agenda._ Consider this:
[Billionaire Soros POURED $18 BILLION into his _Open Society Foundation_](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=8b92f2b6ad&e=9da9b0ca31), the second largest "philanthropic" organization in the U.S. **_New York Times_ calls it:** "...one of the largest transfers of wealth ever made by a private donor to a single foundation." With Soros' $18 billion, _Open Society_ does such charitable work as publishing “Gun Control in the United States” demanding a host of new federal and state gun restrictions and quietly pressuring lawmakers around the country.

You see, this is their plan: push their agenda and distract us from the **_real issues_** going on in our country. The mainstream wants to IGNORE the issues that really matter such as the millions of unborn children that are murdered and have their body parts sold through Planned Parenthood. _**The Consequences of Roe v. Wade**_ [**60,069,971**](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=cf8fb013b7&e=9da9b0ca31) **Total abortions since 1973 **

\-----------------------------------

**_Addiction to alcohol, drugs, opioids_**
[20 million](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=f3a47992c4&e=9da9b0ca31)
**in 2016 alone.**

\------------------------------------

_**School Shootings**_
**297 **
**Total deaths since 1980**

Who is the real killer of the innocent in society? If these billionaires were really concerned about loss of innocent lives, shouldn't they be using their billions to help fight the senseless murders carried out by Planned Parenthood?

The left wants to distract our entire discourse and focus on dismantling the Constitution, starting with our 2nd Amendment. So long as they control the discussion, we play their game. **We must rise up as conservatives and go on the offense! ** Soros and his billionaire buddies opportunistically await the next mass shooting so they can finally pass legislation that erases our 2nd amendment right to protect our families. **Together WE MUST FIGHT these powerful forces. Together we can**. We must get active, we must support men like Courtland Sykes who understand these grave issues. Support America First Candidates like Courtland Sykes to defend your inalienable right to bear arms. This is an urgent issue. This is a NOW issue. The Constitution does not give us the right to bear arms. It says the right to bear arms shall not be infringed.**We already have the right, because it doesn’t come from government—it comes from God.** Until we stand up and declare war on the REAL ISSUES affecting our society, such as the abortions through Planned Parenthood and our drug and opioid crisis _we will be no better then the mass shooters. We are better than this. We are stronger than this. Let's stand up and fight._ **“A society that will trade a little liberty for a little order will lose both, and deserve neither.” ** **— Thomas Jefferson ** Caleb Moore
Communications Director
Courtland Sykes for Senate

subject: my husband, Bob
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e660a/51dbcc2a/517f650/3a5f3ef/219898037/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Hi there,

Now that Bob's re-election campaign is in full swing, there's something I want to make sure you know about him: no matter what his official title has been, he's always answered first to "Dad."

Bob has been like any other dad in a lot of ways -- always encouraging our daughters to do their best, supporting them through good times and bad and telling really bad Dad jokes, just to enjoy a laugh with them. When they were little, he'd sneak them sweets, often putting a piece of candy under their pillow if he missed their bedtime. He coached their basketball teams with an endless amount of patience, never worrying about winning, just wanting them to play their best and love the game like he did.

**Our family will be celebrating with Bob this weekend, and I know he'd be touched if you celebrated along with us._[Can you donate $5 or whatever you can to support his campaign today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180616_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Bob brings that same patience and care to his work in the Senate. He likes to dig deep into the heart of an issue and make sure he understands it fully. He truly cares about people -- I enjoy watching him interact with his constituents, giving them his full attention and committing to doing whatever he can to help them out. I know I'm biased, but as a Pennsylvania voter myself, I'm proud to know that he represents me in Washington.

**Bob is working hard to make sure that all parents are able to find good jobs with decent wages so that they can put food on the table and a roof over their families' heads. Show your support this Father's Day weekend by donating to his campaign:**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180616_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thank you,

Terese

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180616_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: an exciting event in Phoenix
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Friends,

We're excited to announce an exciting event next Saturday in Phoenix, but it won't be complete without you there!

Join Team O'Halleran, along with Rep. Ruben Gallego and Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus, Rep. Linda Sanchez for a brunch and discussion on voter engagement in the 2018 elections! Guests are encouraged to contribute any any level of support. Contributions will benefit the O'Halleran Victory Fund, and will be used in partnership with the Arizona Democratic Party to turn out voters in November.

To contribute and RSVP automatically>>https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180623ovf

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Team O'Halleran

Please join us for brunch
and a discussion on voter engagement with
Rep. Tom O'Halleran (AZ-01)

Featuring Special Guests
Rep. Linda Sánchez (CA-38)
Rep. Ruben Gallego (AZ-07)

Saturday, June 23rd
10:00-11:30AM
The University Club of Phoenix
39 E Monte Vista Rd
Phoenix, AZ 85004
Host Levels (contribute or raise):
Host $1000 - Sponsor $500 - Friend $250 - Guest $100

Guests are encouraged to contribute any amount they are able to give.

Contributions will support Latino and Tribal turnout in November!
Contributions will benefit the O'Halleran Victory Fund.

To contribute online, and RSVP automatically, please visit:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180623ovf

Please make checks payable to "O'Halleran Victory Fund" and mail to:
O'Halleran Victory Fund
2910 E Gary Way
Phoenix, AZ 85042

For more information, to RSVP, or to join the host committee, please contact
Charlie Burgin at charlie@tomohalleran.com or (480)227-0333
Contributions or gifts to O'Halleran Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to O'Halleran Victory Fund will by allocated as follows: The first $2,700 of a contribution from a person and the first $5,000 of a contribution from a multi-candidate PAC will be allocated to Tom O'Halleran for Congress for the 2018 Primary Election, the net $2,700 of a contribution from a person and the next $5,000 of a contribution from a multi-candidate PAC will be allocated to Tom O'Halleran for Congress for the 2018 General Election and any remaining funds up to $10,000 per calendar year from a person or a $5,000 from a multi-candidate PAC will be allocated to Arizona Democratic Party. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

For more information, to RSVP, or to join the host committee,
please contact Charlie Burgin by June 27
charlie@tomohalleran.com or (480) 227-0333

Checks can be mailed to:
Tom O'Halleran for Congress, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

Can't make it? That's okay -- you can help make the event a success by clicking below:
http://action.tomohalleran.com/regrets

Contributions and gifts to Tom O'Halleran for Congress are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Federal election law limits contributions to $2,700 per person per election (primary and general). Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals lacking "green cards," labor organizations & federal government contractors are prohibited. Printed

This message was emailed to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe from this email list, please paste this URL into your browser:
http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
